title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 37. COLLECTION AND SUBMISSION OF DATA

RELATED TO LAW ENFORCEMENT ACTIVITIES

§2901. Short title

            This Chapter may be cited as the "Police Data Accountability, Transparency, and Analysis Act" or the "Police DATA Act".

            Acts 2019, No. 165, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 37.  COLLECTION AND SUBMISSION OF DATA
RELATED TO LAW ENFORCEMENT ACTIVITIES
§2901.  Short title
This Chapter may be cited as the "Police Data Accountability, Transparency, and
Analysis Act" or the "Police DATA Act".
Acts 2019, No. 165, §1.
